title: 如梦金色雪
description:
Girls × Fantasy × Mystery

Indie Game "Dreamy Golden Snow"

[Introduction]

This is a fantasy mystery visual novel that tells a story among high school girls.

The story takes place in a high school.

It’s ordinary, just like countless other schools that educate students.

Until an unexpected death occurs.

[Story]

Bai Yi wakes up in darkness and realizes three things.

First, she doesn’t recognize this place—she has no idea where she is.

Second, she seems to have lost ■■■■■■■.

Third, she is being haunted by ■■■.

[Features]

A tightly woven story

About 4 - 6 hrs game time

Over 30 story illustrations

An interactive clue investigation system

A rich character gallery

Engaging story presentation

[Disclaimer]

• This game is a work of fiction.

Any resemblance to actual events, locations, or persons, living or dead, is purely coincidental.

• This game is classified as a suspense-driven experience rather than a logic-based deduction game.

Player choices are unrestricted, and there are no penalties for any selection.

• This game contains sensitive content, including depictions of murder, suicide, and self-harm.

Viewer discretion is advised. Please discontinue play if you feel uncomfortable.

• Certain scenes and events are intentionally dramatized for storytelling purposes.

They are not intended to reflect real-life situations and should not be imitated.

• This game includes negative portrayals of certain professions for storytelling purposes.

These opinions are fictional and do not represent the views of the developer.

• Some characters may express opinions or viewpoints that could be considered disturbing or offensive.

These opinions are fictional and do not represent the views of the developer.

• This game contains minor lesbian themes.

These elements are present but are not a central focus of the game.
description_short: Dreamy Golden Snow is a fantasy mystery-themed visual novel that tells a story among high school girls. The story appears in an ordinary high school. After the incident, the protagonist is also affected, and players will guide her through numerous choices to uncover the truth.
